sys_remote_update_set.name: Meeting Room Booking
sys_remote_update_set.summary: Custom table u_meeting_room_booking with fields and status choices for meeting room booking requests

sys_update_xml.name: sys_db_object_28b1b3b3e457484084d9be8c0672ab29
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_db_object"><sys_db_object action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <create_access_controls>false</create_access_controls> <create_module/> <create_role/> <description>Meeting room booking requests with conflict checking and manager approval</description> <extendable>false</extendable> <label>Meeting Room Booking</label> <name>u_meeting_room_booking</name> <super_class/> <sys_class_name>sys_db_object</sys_class_name> <sys_id>28b1b3b3e457484084d9be8c0672ab29</sys_id> <sys_name>u_meeting_room_booking</sys_name> <sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope> </sys_db_object></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_dictionary_ccfaf3ff3c2444728d0794cd48e6b762
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_dictionary"><sys_dictionary action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <active>true</active> <array>false</array> <calculation/> <choice>0</choice> <column_label>Room Name</column_label> <default_value></default_value> <element>u_room_name</element> <internal_type display_value="string">string</internal_type> <mandatory>true</mandatory> <max_length>100</max_length> <name>u_meeting_room_booking</name> <reference/> <read_only>false</read_only> <sys_id>ccfaf3ff3c2444728d0794cd48e6b762</sys_id> <sys_name>u_meeting_room_booking.u_room_name</sys_name> <sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope> <table_reference>false</table_reference> <use_dynamic_default>false</use_dynamic_default> </sys_dictionary></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_dictionary_2788237965df4b2a8f410c26447aa9a3
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_dictionary"><sys_dictionary action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <active>true</active> <array>false</array> <calculation/> <choice>0</choice> <column_label>Location / Floor</column_label> <default_value></default_value> <element>u_location</element> <internal_type display_value="string">string</internal_type> <mandatory>false</mandatory> <max_length>100</max_length> <name>u_meeting_room_booking</name> <reference/> <read_only>false</read_only> <sys_id>2788237965df4b2a8f410c26447aa9a3</sys_id> <sys_name>u_meeting_room_booking.u_location</sys_name> <sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope> <table_reference>false</table_reference> <use_dynamic_default>false</use_dynamic_default> </sys_dictionary></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_dictionary_4e65f4159c094a098a076a808c236a1a
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_dictionary"><sys_dictionary action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <active>true</active> <array>false</array> <calculation/> <choice>0</choice> <column_label>Start Date & Time</column_label> <default_value></default_value> <element>u_start_datetime</element> <internal_type display_value="glide_date_time">glide_date_time</internal_type> <mandatory>true</mandatory> <max_length/> <name>u_meeting_room_booking</name> <reference/> <read_only>false</read_only> <sys_id>4e65f4159c094a098a076a808c236a1a</sys_id> <sys_name>u_meeting_room_booking.u_start_datetime</sys_name> <sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope> <table_reference>false</table_reference> <use_dynamic_default>false</use_dynamic_default> </sys_dictionary></record_update>

sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_dictionary"><sys_dictionary action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <active>true</active> <array>false</array> <calculation/> <choice>0</choice> <column_label>End Date & Time</column_label> <default_value></default_value> <element>u_end_datetime</element> <internal_type display_value="glide_date_time">glide_date_time</internal_type> <mandatory>true</mandatory> <max_length/> <name>u_meeting_room_booking</name> <reference/> <read_only>false</read_only> <sys_id>be9bb31ff24a49a8a4d4d2efdbc69088</sys_id> <sys_name>u_meeting_room_booking.u_end_datetime</sys_name> <sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope> <table_reference>false</table_reference> <use_dynamic_default>false</use_dynamic_default> </sys_dictionary></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_dictionary_eafb9f996b7d49aab2d0fb4cb95c5389
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_dictionary"><sys_dictionary action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <active>true</active> <array>false</array> <calculation/> <choice>0</choice> <column_label>Number of Attendees</column_label> <default_value></default_value> <element>u_attendees</element> <internal_type display_value="integer">integer</internal_type> <mandatory>false</mandatory> <max_length/> <name>u_meeting_room_booking</name> <reference/> <read_only>false</read_only> <sys_id>eafb9f996b7d49aab2d0fb4cb95c5389</sys_id> <sys_name>u_meeting_room_booking.u_attendees</sys_name> <sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope> <table_reference>false</table_reference> <use_dynamic_default>false</use_dynamic_default> </sys_dictionary></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_dictionary_cc28eb2a864e4fb79166b0de3d2078a0
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_dictionary"><sys_dictionary action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <active>true</active> <array>false</array> <calculation/> <choice>0</choice> <column_label>Meeting Purpose</column_label> <default_value></default_value> <element>u_purpose</element> <internal_type display_value="string">string</internal_type> <mandatory>true</mandatory> <max_length>200</max_length> <name>u_meeting_room_booking</name> <reference/> <read_only>false</read_only> <sys_id>cc28eb2a864e4fb79166b0de3d2078a0</sys_id> <sys_name>u_meeting_room_booking.u_purpose</sys_name> <sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope> <table_reference>false</table_reference> <use_dynamic_default>false</use_dynamic_default> </sys_dictionary></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_dictionary_ac3aff20105945cc98f029b1df5fbaa2
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_dictionary"><sys_dictionary action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <active>true</active> <array>false</array> <calculation/> <choice>0</choice> <column_label>Equipment Needed</column_label> <default_value></default_value> <element>u_equipment_needed</element> <internal_type display_value="string">string</internal_type> <mandatory>false</mandatory> <max_length>500</max_length> <name>u_meeting_room_booking</name> <reference/> <read_only>false</read_only> <sys_id>ac3aff20105945cc98f029b1df5fbaa2</sys_id> <sys_name>u_meeting_room_booking.u_equipment_needed</sys_name> <sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope> <table_reference>false</table_reference> <use_dynamic_default>false</use_dynamic_default> </sys_dictionary></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_dictionary_f7b305b3e873485f98c2553b3665ffdf
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_dictionary"><sys_dictionary action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <active>true</active> <array>false</array> <calculation/> <choice>0</choice> <column_label>Rejection Reason</column_label> <default_value></default_value> <element>u_rejection_reason</element> <internal_type display_value="string">string</internal_type> <mandatory>false</mandatory> <max_length>500</max_length> <name>u_meeting_room_booking</name> <reference/> <read_only>false</read_only> <sys_id>f7b305b3e873485f98c2553b3665ffdf</sys_id> <sys_name>u_meeting_room_booking.u_rejection_reason</sys_name> <sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope> <table_reference>false</table_reference> <use_dynamic_default>false</use_dynamic_default> </sys_dictionary></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_dictionary_5ad00cfc451f4057bb56f6906626fb3c
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_dictionary"><sys_dictionary action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <active>true</active> <array>false</array> <calculation/> <choice>0</choice> <column_label>Approved By</column_label> <default_value></default_value> <element>u_approved_by</element> <internal_type display_value="reference">reference</internal_type> <mandatory>false</mandatory> <max_length/> <name>u_meeting_room_booking</name> <reference display_value="sys_user">sys_user</reference> <read_only>true</read_only> <sys_id>5ad00cfc451f4057bb56f6906626fb3c</sys_id> <sys_name>u_meeting_room_booking.u_approved_by</sys_name> <sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope> <table_reference>false</table_reference> <use_dynamic_default>false</use_dynamic_default> </sys_dictionary></record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_choice_c5720544875847a0b0e421c0466c04b7
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?><record_update table="sys_choice"><sys_choice action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <dependent_value/> <element>u_status</element> <hint/> <inactive>false</inactive> <label>Pending Approval</label> <language>en</language> <name>u_meeting_room_booking</name> <sequence>100</sequence> <sys_id>c5720544875847a0b0e421c0466c04b7</sys_id> <sys_scope display_value="Global">global</sys_scope> <value>pending_approval</value> </sys_choice></record_update>
